entities.name: Coordinator
entities.context: Main conversation that orchestrates worker threads in a build pattern

entities.name: Worker
entities.context: Independent execution unit that handles a specific part of a build

entities.context: Worker 1 responsibility - foundational data layer work

entities.name: API Endpoints

entities.name: Test Suite

relationships.context: Coordinator creates and manages worker briefs
